components.cta_style: pill-shaped with primary orange background (#FF5000), white text, full-width on cards
components.card_style: white background (#FFFFFF) on grey canvas (#F5F5F5), 2-column waterfall grid, 8px border-radius, 8px internal padding, no visible border/shadow
components.nav_style: fixed bottom bar (50px height) on white background, 5-tab layout, active tab in #FF5000, inactive tabs in #666666, icon + text pattern
components.search_style: rounded pill (radius ~16px) on #FF5000 header background, white (#FFFFFF) fill, horizontally centered with 18px side margins, placeholder text in grey

mood_description: High-energy commercial; warm orange brand (#FF5000) dominates the header and active states, creating urgency and excitement. The grey canvas (#F5F5F5) with white cards produces a clean, scannable product grid. Price text in bold red (#FF2D00) draws immediate attention. Multi-colored category/promo accents (pink, purple, teal, green) add vibrancy while maintaining readability. Overall mood: lively, transactional, dense-but-organized -- classic Chinese mobile e-commerce aesthetic prioritizing conversion over minimalism.
